description: A ground-level photograph depicts a dense stand of tall, slender deciduous trees, likely a poplar plantation. The trees have pale grey-brown trunks that are uniformly spaced, extending vertically upwards. Their foliage is green, with lighter, almost silvery-green patches on some leaves, suggesting movement from wind or the specific leaf underside colour. Sparse green vegetation, possibly grass or low shrubs, covers the ground in the foreground. The background shows more trees, indicating the continuation of the stand. There is a slight motion blur effect visible at the bottom of the image.
